title: Is it possible to send an email notification of each employee's My Work tab?
excerpt:
Hello, 
Is it possible to have an email automatically sent out to each item subscriber with a full list of their assigned items (like what they see in the MyWork tab), the associated group it belongs to, and a timeline o…

posts.author: AJA (Alex Annand)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Is it possible to have an email automatically sent out to each item subscriber with a full list of their assigned items (like what they see in the MyWork tab), the associated group it belongs to, and a timeline of said item? I was hoping to send an automated email out every Monday/Thursday to remind those assigned tasks what they have assigned to them.

We don’t use Monday as often as some of our other apps so wanted it to be more of a convenience email since some may not check it day to day.

Thanks!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @AJA! Just wanted to check in and see if this is something you still need some guidance on! If so, let us know at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to help out!
